_comment: HarnessV2 prd stage hook manifest. install pipeline reads this and materializes the corresponding .claude/hooks/prd/<script>.py files plus a hooks section in .claude/settings.json.

hooks.purpose: Block direct Write/Edit of prd.contract.yaml; must use harness contract fill/patch.
Block product/product-definition.md / spec.md writes outside the prd stage worktree.
Set prd.contract.yaml pending_reviewer_recheck=true after product/product-definition.md edit so the pre-advance check fires.
Block harness gate/contract advance when prd.contract.yaml has pending_reviewer_recheck=true (enforces no-skip-recheck-after-fix HARD-GATE).
Block harness mission stage complete prd when gate run --stage prd has not passed.

HarnessV2 prd hook BLOCKED: direct Write/Edit of prd.contract.yaml is not allowed.
Use `harness contract fill` or `harness contract patch` instead.
